title: Keely Triune PASS: Brinton's three Laws of Being mapped to QA orbit dynamics
_fixture_purpose: Maps Professor Daniel Brinton's three Laws of Being (derived from Keely's Triune) to QA orbit dynamics. Law of Assimilation = cosmos (expansion/syntropy), Law of Individualization = satellite (contraction/entropy), Law of the Dominant = singularity (neutral balance). The three primes (2,3,5) that Ramsay identifies as generating all harmony = the first three primes always present in QA bead numbers.

witnesses.svp_property: every object assimilates itself to all other objects (syntropy, expansion)
witnesses.qa_property: cosmos 24-cycle visits 72 states — maximum reach, assimilates the full state space

witnesses.svp_property: every object tends to assimilate all other objects to itself (entropy, contraction)
witnesses.qa_property: satellite 8-cycle is bounded and symmetric — self-referential, individualized structure

witnesses.svp_property: higher dominant force controls both tendencies (neutral center)
witnesses.qa_property: singularity (9,9) is the unique fixed point — controls/anchors the entire orbit structure

witnesses.svp_property: Ramsay: 'number 3 is creative power in music, producing fifths'
witnesses.qa_property: three primes {2,3,5} always present in QA QN products (all products divisible by 6=2×3)
